verification_gate: Red tests fail first for: Every env var and state path classified; Rule: nothing durable on host /run; Feeds [[tasks/yzx-iso/t3-0-lane-index]]; green only when all pass with a recorded proof record.

gate_result.red_first: gates committed red at lifeos a82c166 (6/6 failing: tier map absent), green at HEAD (6/6)
gate_result.classification_evidence: isolation_tier_map.json classifies 18 entries — the six agent env vars (CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, CODEX_HOME, YAZELIX_STATE_DIR, XDG_DATA_HOME, XDG_STATE_HOME, ICM_DB) and the state/cache/release paths (postgres datadir, redb plane, transcripts, profile-runtime, cargo-target, rustup, build tmp, runner _work root, nix-profile frontdoor, release closure, gitkb db, envctl tables) — each into exactly one of volatile/durable/portable.
gate_result.rule_evidence: The map's rule is nothing-durable-on-host-run; zero durable entries target /run, and entries whose CURRENT location still violates the rule (tmpfs profile-runtime, CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR, CODEX_HOME, YAZELIX_STATE_DIR) are honestly flagged misplaced:true with durable target paths off /run — the 2026-07-21 loss surface is recorded, not hidden.
gate_result.feeds_evidence: The map feeds tasks/yzx-iso/t3-0-lane-index (runtime relocation, ARCHBP-072..077/131).
gate_result.product_execution_evidence: tests/archbp-059-tier-map.spec.ts executes against the published planning-spine-v0/docs/isolation_tier_map.json, enforcing tier validity, required-surface coverage, the /run rule, and honest misplaced flags.

proof_summary: ARCHBP-059 is complete: every known runtime env var and state path is classified into volatile/durable/portable in the versioned isolation_tier_map.json under the normative nothing-durable-on-host-run rule; current violations (the tmpfs profile-runtime tree that caused the 2026-07-21 session loss, plus home residuals) are flagged misplaced with durable targets rather than hidden, so classification cannot drift silently. The map feeds the t3 runtime-relocation lane.
